review: Very soft merino blend wool. Keeps me warm during chilly mornings and doesn't flatten my hair at all. Highly recommended!
Bought matching headwraps for my wife and daughter. They both look so adorable and feel extremely cozy. Perfect for our family bonding moments! 🧶🏡
The lavender hue is absolutely gorgeous and so calming. This is the softest ribbed headband I've ever owned. Feels like a warm cloud on my ears!
very much comfortable to wear and suites every occasion
